_comment: TEMPLATE — copy entries into repeaters.json and replace EXAMPLE values with real data. `admins` is a reusable directory; a repeater's `admin` is an id into it, so several repeaters can share one operator (see example-op below).

example-op.name: REPLACE ME - Operator handle
example-op.publicKey: REPLACE ME - full hex public key (or null)

repeaters.name: EXAMPLE - Town Common
repeaters.location: REPLACE ME - street / landmark, Burlington, MA
repeaters.hardware: REPLACE ME - e.g. Heltec V3 / RAK WisBlock
repeaters.publicKey: REPLACE ME - full hex public key

repeaters.name: EXAMPLE - Pine Hill
repeaters.location: REPLACE ME - street / landmark, Burlington, MA
repeaters.publicKey: REPLACE ME - full hex public key

repeaters.name: BUR - Chestnut
repeaters.location: Corner of Chestnut Ave & Hershey Road, Burlington, MA
repeaters.hardware: SenseCAP Solar Node P1-Pro (solar / battery powered)
